title: Set up BullMQ for background job processing with Redis
summary: Install BullMQ, create typed job queues and workers, implement retry logic with exponential backoff, and process jobs in a separate worker process.
declaration: I will set up BullMQ for reliable background job processing. BullMQ requires a running Redis instance (self-hosted or via Upstash with ioredis). Jobs run in a separate Worker process — NOT inside Next.js API routes or serverless functions. If you need a fully serverless job queue, consider Inngest instead.
